title: Creating a new item and connecting the boards loses all subitem information
excerpt: We would like to use the create an item and connect boards automation, however when we create the item in the new board the subitem information is lost. Ideally everything about the item would be able to be pulled across…

posts.author: amber1795 (Amber Maguire)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to use the create an item and connect boards automation, however when we create the item in the new board the subitem information is lost. Ideally everything about the item would be able to be pulled across so we can have consistency across boards and connect them as well

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Amber!

I just converted your previous post into a feature request that aligns with your point here. You can find it here → Automation to duplicate an item to a board then linking the boards (to retain subitems + updates)

Let me know if you have any issues with this
